Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11899 0 0}So delicious! Ah, this must be true bliss![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}Still, I cannot help but feel anxious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11867 0 0}Perhaps this is not the time to obsess over food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}I must hurry and complete the kimono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11904 0 0}I do not have a sewing machine at my house! I must endure until we are able to return to school![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}A true samurai must persevere through whatever life may throw at them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11839 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}You are right! A true samurai must persevere through whatever life may throw at them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}{f 5 13 15 30 112}...Yes, of course, of course! Rushing will not help! I must keep my composure and relax![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11900 0 0}That reminds me... There is a wise Japanese proverb for this very occasion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}You cannot fight on an empty stomach! So now I eat, and eat I shall![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After enjoying a meal together,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
